title: KosDB v2.2.0 - Advanced Features Release
instructions: Implement advanced database features including query optimization, connection pooling, data compression, geospatial indexing, and time-series support. Focus on performance, scalability, and enterprise-grade features.

1783778236.1165204.instruction: Implement query plan caching to avoid re-parsing identical queries. Add prepared statement support with parameterized queries for security and performance. Create PREPARE, EXECUTE, and DEALLOCATE commands. Cache parsed query plans with LRU eviction and invalidation when schema changes.

log.text: Implemented Query Plan Cache with LRU eviction, TTL support, table-based invalidation, and statistics tracking. Created PreparedStatementManager with named/positional parameters, session management, and parameter validation. Added parser extensions for PREPARE, EXECUTE, DEALLOCATE commands. Created command handlers for integration. All tests passing (27 total).

1783778247.9111686.instruction: Implement database connection pooling for efficient resource utilization. Create ConnectionPool class with configurable min/max connections, connection timeout, idle timeout, and health checking. Add connection monitoring with active/idle/total statistics. Implement proper cleanup and connection validation. Support async connection acquisition.

log.text: Implemented complete connection pooling system: ConnectionPool class with configurable min/max connections, connection timeout, idle timeout with automatic cleanup, health checking, and comprehensive statistics tracking. Added pool_commands.py for CLI integration (POOL CREATE, STATUS, LIST, SHUTDOWN, HEALTH, ACQUIRE). Created pool_parser.py for command parsing. Full async support with async/await and context managers. Global pool registry for named pools. All 22 tests passing.

1783778250.6317654.instruction: Implement transparent data compression for storage efficiency. Support multiple compression algorithms (lz4, zstd, snappy). Create CompressedStorage wrapper for LevelDB. Add compression level configuration per table. Implement automatic compression ratio monitoring. Support decompression on read with caching of uncompressed data.

log.text: Implemented complete data compression system: compression.py with support for LZ4, Zstandard, Snappy, and zlib algorithms with automatic fallback. Created CompressedStorage wrapper for LevelDB with per-table compression configuration, automatic compression ratio monitoring, and LRU decompression caching. Added CLI commands (COMPRESSION ENABLE/DISABLE/STATS/ALGORITHMS/BENCHMARK/TEST/CACHE). All 13 compression tests passing.

1783778261.978801.instruction: Implement geospatial indexing with R-tree or quadtree data structures. Support POINT, POLYGON, and CIRCLE geometry types. Create SPATIAL INDEX for location data. Implement spatial query operators: NEAR, WITHIN, INTERSECTS, BOUNDING_BOX. Add distance calculation (haversine). Support geohash encoding for efficient range queries. Include example for location-based services.

log.text: Implemented complete geospatial indexing system: R-tree spatial index with Point, Circle, and Polygon geometry types. Haversine distance calculation for accurate Earth-surface distances. Geohash encoding/decoding with neighbor lookup for efficient range queries. Spatial query operators: NEAR (radius search), WITHIN (geometry containment), INTERSECTS (bbox intersection), BOUNDING_BOX. CLI commands for CREATE/DROP SPATIAL INDEX, spatial queries, distance calculation, and geohash operations. All 21 geospatial tests passing.

1783778264.674676.instruction: Implement native time-series data support with automatic time-based partitioning. Create hypertable abstraction for large time-series datasets. Support time-based aggregation functions: time_bucket, first, last, avg over time windows. Implement automatic data retention policies with TTL. Add downsampling for historical data. Support time-range queries with optimized filtering.

log.text: Implemented complete time-series data support: Hypertable abstraction with automatic time-based partitioning into configurable chunks. TimeBucket class for aggregation with support for 1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 6h, 1d, 1w, 30d buckets. Time-series aggregation functions: avg, sum, min, max, first, last, count. Automatic retention policies with TTL and background cleanup worker. Downsampling from fine to coarse granularity. Time-range queries with partition pruning for optimization. TimeSeriesEngine for managing multiple hypertables. All 12 tests passing.

1783778267.605036.instruction: Implement multi-tenant architecture with namespace isolation. Create tenant management commands: CREATE TENANT, DROP TENANT, USE TENANT. Support resource quotas per tenant (storage limits, query limits, connection limits). Implement tenant-aware access control with row-level security policies. Add tenant isolation in backup/restore operations.

log.text: Implemented complete multi-tenant architecture: Tenant class with namespace isolation, ResourceQuota for storage/connections/queries/tables/rows limits, ResourceUsage tracking with automatic query rate limiting. RowLevelPolicy for row-level security with pattern matching. TenantManager for CRUD operations and global statistics. TenantContext for scoped operations with automatic connection cleanup. CLI commands for CREATE/DROP/USE TENANT, LIST TENANTS, TENANT STATS, SET QUOTA, ADD/REMOVE ROW POLICY, CHECK QUOTA, TENANT BACKUP/RESTORE. All 19 tests passing.

1783778270.8395822.instruction: Implement Change Data Capture to stream database changes to external systems. Create CDC log with ordered change events (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE). Support multiple output formats: JSON, Avro, Protobuf. Implement CDC consumers with configurable filtering by table/operation. Add Kafka connector for event streaming. Support snapshot initialization for new consumers.

1783778273.50278.instruction: Implement automatic query rewriting for optimization. Add materialized view support with CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW and REFRESH commands. Implement incremental refresh strategies: full refresh, incremental refresh with change tracking. Support query result caching for materialized views. Add REFRESH SCHEDULE for automatic periodic updates.

1783778275.7718377.instruction: Implement advanced security features: audit logging for all database operations, data encryption at rest using AES-256, column-level encryption for sensitive fields, role-based access control (RBAC) with fine-grained permissions, and SQL injection detection with query analysis. Add security policy enforcement and compliance reporting.
